issues.sample: After the Vespa has sat for a couple days, the rear (right) brake lever locks up and is unable to be pulled after the ABS light goes out.  Usually, I can pull pressure to the lever and it will free up.  This started happening around the end of August 2022.  Today, 12-3-2022, I tr

The contact owns a 2020 Piaggio Vespa GTS 300. The contact stated while driving at 5-10 MPH, the vehicle stalled. The contact stated he was able to restart the vehicle; however, the failure reoccurred several times while driving on that same day. The vehicle was taken to the deal

narrative.headline: What 2020 Vespa Gts 300 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 8 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (88% of reports).
